nasb.text: Ethiopia, Put, Lud, all Arabia, Libya and the people of the land that is in league will fall with them by the sword.”

esv.text: Cush, and Put, and Lud, and all Arabia, and Libya, and the people of the land that is in league, shall fall with them by the sword.

cnv.text: 古實人、弗人、路德人、所有外族的人、呂彼亞人，以及與埃及結盟的人，都必與埃及人一起倒在刀下。

ccb.text: 古实、弗、路德、阿拉伯和利比亚以及她的其他盟友都必与她一同死于刀下。’
